title: 5-Mode High-Pressure Water Saving Shower Head with ON/Off Switch, Adjustable Angle Bracket, Self-Cleaning Nozzles, Durable ABS Build, Easy Wall Mount
features: 5 SPRAY MODES FOR CUSTOMIZED COMFORT: Enjoy a personalised shower experience with five distinct spray settings from gentle mist to powerful massage. Whether you need a relaxing rinse or a high-pressure cleanse, this shower head adapts to your mood and needs, enhancing your daily routine with spa-like versatility.

DURABLE & HEAT-RESISTANT BUILD: Crafted from high-hardness ABS material, this shower head resists high temperatures and wear, ensuring long-term durability and safety. Its robust design makes it ideal for daily use, even in high-humidity environments, without compromising performance or aesthetics.

ONE-KEY WATER STOP FUNCTION: Designed for convenience, the built-in ON/OFF switch lets you pause water flow instantly with a single press, perfect for saving water while shampooing or lathering. This humanised feature adds control and efficiency to your shower routine, reducing unnecessary water waste.

SELF-CLEANING NOZZLE TECHNOLOGY: Equipped with 84 self-cleaning silicone nozzles and 26 ABS outlets across a 9cm panel, this shower head prevents clogging and ensures consistent water flow. Maintenance is effortless; just a quick wipe keeps it clean, making it ideal for hard water areas.

EASY WALL MOUNT WITH ADJUSTABLE BRACKET: Install in minutes with the adhesive wall mount; just clean, peel, and press. The angle-adjustable overhead bracket allows hands-free operation and flexible positioning, so you can direct the spray exactly where you want it for maximum comfort and convenience.
